description: CompositionGrey shorts made of 100% polyester, is engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has an elasticated waist with drawcords, pockets on the sides and heat transferred nike swoosh logo on the left thighFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry clean, bleach or lay on itself when wetTumble dry lowDo not ironDesigned for the man who never compromises on comfort and style, this short from nike is crafted from polyester fabric that is engineered with Dri-Fit technology to offer a flattering fit and sweat-free comfort. Add on sporty jerseys and sneakers.
